  • Uses of IMessageBus in edu.yu.cs.com3810.device

    Fields in edu.yu.cs.com3810.device declared as IMessageBus
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected IMessageBus
    InputDevice.messageBus
    The message bus used to publish events and heartbeats.
    Methods in edu.yu.cs.com3810.device with parameters of type IMessageBus
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    IEdgeDevice.start(IMessageBus messageBus)
    Starts the device: registers with the message bus, publishes a RegistrationPayload to the REGISTER topic, subscribes to the COMMAND topic to receive commands, and begins emitting heartbeats on the HEARTBEAT topic.
    void
    InputDevice.start(IMessageBus messageBus)
    Starts the device: registers with the message bus, publishes a RegistrationPayload to the REGISTER topic, subscribes to the COMMAND topic to receive commands, and begins emitting heartbeats on the HEARTBEAT topic.
    void
    SmartLight.start(IMessageBus messageBus)
    Starts the device: registers with the message bus, publishes a RegistrationPayload to the REGISTER topic, subscribes to the COMMAND topic to receive commands, and begins emitting heartbeats on the HEARTBEAT topic.
    void
    SmartSpeaker.start(IMessageBus messageBus)
    Starts the device: registers with the message bus, publishes a RegistrationPayload to the REGISTER topic, subscribes to the COMMAND topic to receive commands, and begins emitting heartbeats on the HEARTBEAT topic.
